name: Random User Generator
description: Generate random user data including names, emails, photos, addresses, and more for use in mockups, prototypes, and testing. Free with no API key required.
longDescription: Random User Generator is the developer's best friend for creating realistic test data. It generates complete user profiles including first/last names, email addresses, phone numbers, profile pictures (using real photos), street addresses, usernames, passwords, dates of birth, and more. You can filter by nationality, gender, and request specific fields.
affiliateText: Use this API to seed your app's database. Host your backend for free on Railway.
